notes.purpose: Prototype-tier serious run target: Llama-3.1-8B + QLoRA on a single A100.
notes.hardware: Tuned for 1x A100 40GB (or 80GB). bf16 requires Ampere or newer; A100 qualifies.
notes.gate: Requires HF access to meta-llama/Llama-3.1-8B and a real data manifest. Do NOT run against placeholder JSONL.
notes.notreal: Paths here are local placeholders. Replace train_path/eval_path with the gated Hawaiian corpus before training.
